How Convex Works

For Liquidity Providers
For Stakers
Step 01
Deposit your LP tokens from Curve, Prisma, Frax, or f(x) into Convex
Step 02
Automatically begin earning rewards with the group boost applied
Step 03
Rewards are earned over time, claim them whenever you want
Step 04
You’re free to withdraw your LP tokens at any time

Governance

Locking CVX allows to take part in the governance of Curve, Prisma, Frax, f(x) Protocol, and of course Convex itself.
